chapter_title.en: To the governor of Ardasheer Khorra in Iran

text: أَلَا وَإِنَّ حَقَّ مَنْ قِبَلَكَ وَقِبَلَنَا مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِينَ فِي قِسْمَةِ هذَا الْفَيْءِ سَوَاءٌ، يَرِدُونَ عِنْدِي عَلَيْهِ، وَيَصْدُرُونَ عَنْهُ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: Know that the right of those Muslims who are around you and those who are around me in this property is equal. For that reason they come to me and take from it.
